---
title: "02-clean"
params:
  name: "02-clean"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
path_target <- qproj::proj_path_target(params$name)
path_source <- qproj::proj_path_source(params$name)
path_raw <- path_source("00-raw")
path_resource <- here::here(path_raw, "d00-resource")
path_data <- here::here(path_raw, paste0("d", params$name))
```

```{r}
#| label: clean
library(dplyr)
seqs <- readr::read_csv(path_source("01-import", "seqs.csv"))

# Anti-pattern: this should normally go through path_source.
# We intentionally include it to verify bypass_access detection.
raw_fastq <- here::here(path_raw, "d01-import", "raw.fastq")

# A commented-out path_source() call MUST NOT be detected as a real edge.
# Was once: path_source("nonexistent-step", "ghost.csv")

# Real call into a locally-defined R/qc.R function (literal args).
cleaned <- qc_filter(seqs$x, threshold = 0.05, method = "median")
readr::write_csv(data.frame(x = cleaned), path_target("clean.csv"))
```

```{r}
#| label: db-write
# Open a SQLite connection in this step's data directory and persist a table.
con <- DBI::dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), path_target("db.sqlite"))
DBI::dbWriteTable(con, "raw_seqs", data.frame(x = cleaned))
DBI::dbDisconnect(con)
```
